name: Is suing Perplexity like the Getty vs. Stability AI case?
description: Yes, but Perplexity reproduces text outputs, not just trains.[3]

mainEntity.name: Is suing Perplexity like the Getty vs. Stability AI case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but Perplexity reproduces text outputs, not just trains.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Similar scraping claims but Perplexity focuses on output reproduction vs. Getty's image training; both allege infringement.[2][3] NYT/ Tribune emphasize verbatim text display harming news revenue.[1][6] Key factors: Perplexity's search competes directly; NY court traction vs. mixed image rulings. Text stronger for substitution. Lessons: Register early. Applies broadly.
